name: html-report
description: Build stable editable HTML reports in single-page and PPT modes with style controls, QA, and exports.

interface.shortDescription: Build editable HTML reports and HTML PPT decks
interface.longDescription: Use HTML Report to turn supplied content or existing HTML into stable editable reports. It supports long single-page reports, fixed 16:9 HTML PPT decks, a right-side style drawer, per-element editing, browser QA, and click-triggered HTML, image, PDF, and PPTX exports.
defaultPrompt: Create an editable single-page HTML report from this document.
Convert this HTML report into the stable editable shell.
Build a 16:9 editable HTML PPT deck from this outline.
